chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1233 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08.10.2024 Mr. Abdul Rauf Abro associate of Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate along with petitioner Agha Ather Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Niaz Hussain Mailto, Advocate for respondent- University >>>>>>...<<<<<<< Learned counsel for respondent-University has produced four original cheques in terms of statement filed by him dated 02.10.2024. The original cheques are handed over to the petitioner, who is present in Court under proper acknowledgment. In case the cheques are bounced, the respondent-University shall be exposed to contempt of Court proceedings. Accordingly, the petition has served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
